description: All-uppercase TRANSFER-ENCODING — checks if server normalizes header name casing
rawRequest:
POST /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
TRANSFER-ENCODING: chunked

hello world

description: Space before colon in Content-Length — checks if server strips whitespace before colon
rawRequest:
POST /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Content-Length : 5

hello world

description: Tab character in header name — checks if server normalizes Content\tLength to Content-Length
rawRequest:
POST /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Content	Length: 99

hello world

description: Underscore in Content-Length name — checks if server normalizes Content_Length to Content-Length
rawRequest:
POST /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Content_Length: 99

hello world
rawResponse:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
content-length: 63
connection: keep-alive
x-powered-by: Dart with package:bottom_shelf
date: <DATE>

Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Content_Length: 99

description: Underscore in Transfer-Encoding name — checks if server normalizes Transfer_Encoding to Transfer-Encoding
rawRequest:
POST /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Transfer_Encoding: chunked

hello world
rawResponse:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
content-length: 71
connection: keep-alive
x-powered-by: Dart with package:bottom_shelf
date: <DATE>

Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Content-Length: 11
Transfer_Encoding: chunked
